ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., land-based, sea-based, airport) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gust_speeds" (
  "gust_speed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gust speed record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the gust speed was recorded */,
  "gust_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the gust speed */,
  "gust_speed" REAL /* Maximum gust speed in km/h */,
  "gust_date" TEXT /* Date the gust speed was recorded */,
  "gust_time" TEXT /* Time the gust speed was recorded */,
  "gust_speed_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for gust speed (e.g., km/h, mph) */,
  "gust_direction_degrees" REAL /* Direction of the gust speed in degrees */,
  "gust_speed_source" TEXT /* Source of the gust speed data (e.g., anemometer, weather radar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gust_speed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gust_speeds_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hourly_mean_wind_speeds" (
  "hourly_mean_wind_speed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hourly mean wind speed record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the hourly mean wind speed was recorded */,
  "hourly_mean_wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the hourly mean wind speed */,
  "hourly_mean_wind_speed" REAL /* Maximum hourly mean wind speed in km/h */,
  "hourly_mean_wind_date" TEXT /* Date the hourly mean wind speed was recorded */,
  "hourly_mean_wind_time" TEXT /* Time the hourly mean wind speed was recorded */,
  "hourly_mean_wind_speed_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for hourly mean wind speed (e.g., km/h, mph) */,
  "hourly_mean_wind_direction_degrees" REAL /* Direction of the hourly mean wind speed in degrees */,
  "hourly_mean_wind_speed_source" TEXT /* Source of the hourly mean wind speed data (e.g., anemometer, weather radar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hourly_mean_wind_speed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hourly_mean_wind_speeds_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_observations" (
  "weather_observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather observation */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the weather observation was made */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date the weather observation was made */,
  "observation_time" TEXT /* Time the weather observation was made */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of weather observation (e.g., temperature, humidity, wind speed) */,
  "observation_value" REAL /* Value of the weather observation */,
  "observation_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the weather observation (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit) */,
  "observation_source" TEXT /* Source of the weather observation data (e.g., weather station, satellite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_observations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "weather_observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather observation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather observation was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the weather observation was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., weather observation, forecast) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_observation_id") REFERENCES weather_observations ("weather_observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "weather_forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the weather forecast was made */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the weather forecast was made */,
  "forecast_time" TEXT /* Time the weather forecast was made */,
  "forecast_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather forecast */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Model used to generate the forecast (e.g., GFS, ECMWF) */,
  "forecast_source" TEXT /* Source of the forecast data (e.g., national weather service, weather API) */,
  "forecast_valid_from" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast is valid from */,
  "forecast_valid_to" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast is valid to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_warnings" (
  "weather_warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather warning */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the weather warning was issued */,
  "warning_date" TEXT /* Date the weather warning was issued */,
  "warning_time" TEXT /* Time the weather warning was issued */,
  "warning_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather warning */,
  "warning_level" TEXT /* Level of the warning (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  "warning_source" TEXT /* Source of the warning data (e.g., national weather service, weather API) */,
  "warning_valid_from" TEXT /* Timestamp when the warning is valid from */,
  "warning_valid_to" TEXT /* Timestamp when the warning is valid to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_warning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_warnings_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_patterns" (
  "weather_pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather pattern */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the weather pattern was observed */,
  "pattern_date" TEXT /* Date the weather pattern was observed */,
  "pattern_time" TEXT /* Time the weather pattern was observed */,
  "pattern_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather pattern */,
  "pattern_type" TEXT /* Type of weather pattern (e.g., high pressure, low pressure) */,
  "pattern_source" TEXT /* Source of the pattern data (e.g., satellite imagery, weather radar) */,
  "pattern_valid_from" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pattern is valid from */,
  "pattern_valid_to" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pattern is valid to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_patterns_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)
